sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (value String, default_value Int8) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES ('-10', CAST('1', 'Int8')), ('abc', CAST('0', 'Int8')), ('255', CAST('-1', 'Int8'));
SELECT toInt8OrDefault(value, default_value) AS converted_value FROM test_table;
UPDATE test_table SET default_value = CAST('2', 'Int8') WHERE value = '-10';
SELECT value, toInt8OrDefault(value) AS converted_value FROM test_table WHERE default_value = CAST('0', 'Int8');
